it:81.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
it:81.3: "I have seen beings conquered by receiving offerings — their minds overwhelmed — at the break-up of the body, after death, reappearing in the plane of deprivation, the bad destination, the lower realms, in hell.
it:81.4: I have seen beings conquered by not receiving offerings — their minds overwhelmed — at the break-up of the body, after death, reappearing in the plane of deprivation, the bad destination, the lower realms, in hell.
it:81.5: I have seen beings conquered both by receiving offerings and by not receiving offerings — their minds overwhelmed — at the break-up of the body, after death, reappearing in the plane of deprivation, the bad destination, the lower realms, in hell.
it:81.6: "It's not through having heard it from other brahmans or contemplatives that I say, 'I have seen beings conquered by receiving offerings — their minds overwhelmed — at the break-up of the body, after death, reappearing in the plane of deprivation, the bad destination, the lower realms, in hell.
it:81.7: I have seen beings conquered by not receiving offerings — their minds overwhelmed — at the break-up of the body, after death, reappearing in the plane of deprivation, the bad destination, the lower realms, in hell.
it:81.8: I have seen beings conquered by not receiving offerings — their minds overwhelmed — at the break-up of the body, after death, reappearing in the plane of deprivation, the bad destination, the lower realms, in hell.
it:81.9: I have seen beings conquered both by receiving offerings and by not receiving offerings — their minds overwhelmed — at the break-up of the body, after death, reappearing in the plane of deprivation, the bad destination, the lower realms, in hell.'"
it:81.10: Both when receiving offerings and not: his concentration won't waver, he remains heedful:
it:81.11: he — continually absorbed in jhana, subtle in view and clear-seeing, enjoying the ending of clinging — is called a man of integrity.
it:81.12: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
